requirements.requirement: All data must be encrypted in transit and at rest.
requirements.rationale: Sensitive business data must be protected from disclosure.
requirements.measurement: TLS 1.2+ in transit; AES-256 (or equivalent) at rest; 100% of stores

requirements.requirement: All state-changing actions must be recorded in an immutable audit trail.
requirements.rationale: Compliance and forensics require a complete record.
requirements.measurement: 100% of create/update/delete actions audit-logged with actor + timestamp

requirements.requirement: The system must meet the applicable regulatory baseline for the business domain.
requirements.measurement: Passes the agreed compliance control checklist before go-live
